playlist_strategy: A high-intensity, progressively building sequence starting with a focused warm-up, transitioning into unrelenting, aggressive peak tracks for maximum exertion, and concluding with a powerful but steady cool-down phase.

tracks.title: Ignition Sequence
tracks.youtube_title: Ignition Sequence ⚡ Focused Pre-Workout Warmup | Push Your Limits
tracks.style_prompt: Mid-tempo cyberpunk synthwave, 110 BPM, A Minor. Deep pulsing analog bass groove, crisp drum machine beat. Atmospheric electric guitar swells in the background. Hook within first 5 seconds using a rhythmic bass filter sweep. Clean, hi-fi modern production. Instrumental only.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, close-up of a muscular female athlete tying her lifting shoes in a dimly lit, gritty industrial gym. Intense focus in her eyes. Neon blue and deep purple dramatic rim lighting. Shallow depth of field, high contrast, perfect for YouTube dark mode.
tracks.youtube_description: Get in the zone with 'Ignition Sequence'. The perfect mid-tempo synthwave track to warm up your muscles and focus your mind before a crushing workout session. Let the analog bass drive your stretching routine! 💪🔥 #GymMotivation #WarmupMusic #SynthwaveWorkout

tracks.title: Iron Awakening
tracks.youtube_title: Iron Awakening 🚀 Deep Bass Warmup to Ignite Your Muscles
tracks.energy_curve: steady climb with a heavy mid-point drop
tracks.style_prompt: Industrial mid-tempo bass music, 115 BPM, D Minor. Heavy, distorted 808 kick drums with metallic percussion and clanking industrial textures. Gritty, overdriven synth stabs. Hook in first 5 seconds via a massive distorted kick pattern. Hi-fi modern studio quality. Instrumental only.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, medium close-up of an athlete gripping a heavily loaded barbell. Chalk dust floating in the air against iron grey and hazard orange cinematic lighting. Gritty determination and raw power. Dark, high contrast background, shallow depth of field.
tracks.youtube_description: Activate your central nervous system with 'Iron Awakening'. This heavy, industrial bass track is engineered for mobility work and activation sets. Feel the rhythmic metallic percussion snap your focus into place. 🏋️‍♂️💯 #PowerliftingMusic #HeavyBass #GymBeats

tracks.title: Adrenaline Surge
tracks.youtube_title: Adrenaline Surge 💥 Insane Drop Workout Music | Push Harder!
tracks.energy_curve: explosive drop and sustained high energy
tracks.style_prompt: Aggressive electro house, 128 BPM, F Minor. Punchy four-on-the-floor drum pattern, massive distorted sawtooth synth leads, extreme sidechain compression. Hook within first 5 seconds with a huge snare fill and vocal chant sample. Hi-fi stadium-ready mix. Instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, close-up of a sweaty fitness model screaming through a high-intensity rep. Splashes of sweat frozen in mid-air. Lit entirely by electric cyan and pure black high-contrast lighting. Imposing, intense attitude. YouTube dark mode optimized.
tracks.youtube_description: It is time to push the pace. 'Adrenaline Surge' brings intense electro house drops right to your eardrums for those critical first working sets. Maximize your pump and crush your rep limits! 🔥🚀 #ElectroHouseGym #WorkoutDrops #AdrenalineMusic

tracks.title: Relentless Pace
tracks.youtube_title: Relentless Pace 🏃‍♂️ High Tempo Cardio & Running Motivation
tracks.thumbnail_color_palette: speeding neon green and midnight blue
tracks.style_prompt: Progressive trance, 138 BPM, G Minor. Hypnotic rolling bassline groove, crisp driving 16th-note hi-hats. Ethereal trance pluck arpeggios that build continuously. Hook in first 5 seconds via a fast rhythmic bass sequence. Pristine hi-fi club production. Instrumental only.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, medium close-up of an athlete running full sprint on a treadmill in a dark athletic facility. Motion blur background giving a sense of insane speed. Speeding neon green and midnight blue rim lights. Sweaty but locked into a flow state.
tracks.youtube_description: Find your rhythm and never stop. 'Relentless Pace' delivers continuous, driving 138 BPM progressive trance designed to lock you into an unstoppable flow state for cardio or high-rep endurance lifting. Keep moving! 🏃‍♀️💨 #RunningMusic #CardioTrance #EnduranceTraining

tracks.title: Breaking the Wall
tracks.youtube_title: Breaking the Wall 🦍 BRUTAL Hardstyle for PR Attempts!
tracks.energy_curve: epic build to devastating high-energy drop
tracks.style_prompt: Euphoric hardstyle, 150 BPM, E Minor. Huge distorted hardstyle kick (gong punch), soaring euphoric choir pads abruptly interrupted by aggressive screech synths. Hook in first 5 seconds with a massive stadium-sized kick slam. Extreme, hi-fi modern hard dance mix. Instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, extreme low-angle close-up of an absolute beast of a bodybuilder mid-deadlift. Veins popping, raw primal roar expression. Lit with stark white spotlights and blood red fill light. Pitch black background, massive contrast, insanely hard aesthetic.
tracks.youtube_description: Time to shatter your personal record! 'Breaking the Wall' is pure 150 BPM Hardstyle adrenaline. When this drop hits, there is no weight you cannot lift. Gear up, chalk your hands, and rip it off the floor! 🦍🔥 #HardstyleGym #PRMusic #HeavyLifting

tracks.title: Maximum Overload
tracks.youtube_title: Maximum Overload 💀 INSANE Heavy Dubstep / Trap Workout Drop
tracks.hook_type: cinematic rise and gun cock intro
tracks.style_prompt: Tearout dubstep / hybrid trap, 145 BPM, C# Minor. Ferocious FM bass growls, bone-rattling trap 808s, huge cinematic brass stabs, incredibly punchy metallic snare hits. Hook in first 5 seconds with a mechanical 'gun cock' sample into a heavy bass slide. Mastered for arenas. Instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, close-up of a sweaty athletic woman holding heavy dumbbells during a brutal lunge sequence. Unstoppable force and focus in her expression. Toxic green and deep shadow lighting. Ultra-sharp details on muscle definition. YouTube dark mode perfect.
tracks.youtube_description: Load the bar. 'Maximum Overload' blends face-melting tearout dubstep with massive hybrid trap 808s. Designed specifically for your heaviest, most grueling working sets where giving up is completely out of the question. 😤🔋 #DubstepWorkout #TrapGym #BeastMode

tracks.title: Cardio Killer
tracks.youtube_title: Cardio Killer 🥵 175 BPM Drum & Bass High Speed Pursuit
tracks.style_prompt: Neurofunk drum & bass, 175 BPM, F# Minor. Complex, hyper-chopped breakbeat drum patterns. Gritty, twisting reece basslines that modulate aggressively. Hook in first 5 seconds via a frantic drum solo intro. Ultra-loud, modern UK dance production. Instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, medium close-up of a runner soaked in sweat on an assault bike, breathless exhaustion crossed with triumph. High-intensity strobe white and crimson lighting simulating a chaotic, energetic environment. Very shallow depth of field.
tracks.youtube_description: Push your cardiovascular limits! 'Cardio Killer' is a blistering 175 BPM Drum & Bass masterpiece built for HIIT intervals, sprinting, and assault bike torture sessions. Keep up with the breakbeats if you can! 🚴‍♂️🌪️ #DrumAndBassWorkout #HIITMusic #CardioKiller

tracks.title: Unbreakable Will
tracks.youtube_title: Unbreakable Will 🛡️ Epic Cinematic Rock to Finish Strong
tracks.listening_scenario: final burnout sets and finishing movements
tracks.target_audience: gym beginners and hardcore lifters alike
tracks.thumbnail_emotion: resolute strength and refusal to quit
tracks.style_prompt: Cinematic industrial rock, 95 BPM, B Minor. Slow, crushing, distorted electric guitar riffs mixed with epic orchestral string swells. Heavy acoustic stadium rock drums layered with sub impacts. Hook in first 5 seconds with a massive 8-string guitar chug. Big, wide cinematic mix. Instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, close-up of a male athlete pushing through the final agonizing rep of a bicep curl. Resolute strength and refusal to quit etched into his face. Molten gold rim lighting against dark charcoal background shadows. Heroic composition.
tracks.youtube_description: When the tank is empty, you rely on willpower. 'Unbreakable Will' combines crushing industrial rock guitars with epic cinematic strings to pull you through those agonizing final burnout sets. Finish the drill! 💪🛡️ #EpicWorkoutMusic #GymRock #WorkoutMotivation

tracks.title: The Aftermath
tracks.youtube_title: The Aftermath 🌊 Chill Phonk Cooldown & Stretching
tracks.energy_curve: smooth, steady decline into atmospheric vibes
tracks.style_prompt: Chill wave atmospheric phonk, 110 BPM, A# Minor. Deep, warm, non-aggressive 808 bass glides. Relaxing lo-fi cowbell melodies drenched in reverb. Vintage Rhodes piano chords and relaxed trap drums. Hook in first 5 seconds with a nostalgic tape-saturated synth line. Warm analog production. Instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, medium close-up of a female athlete sitting on a gym bench, wiping sweat with a towel. A look of proud exhaustion and immense relief. Soft dusk purple and pink LED ambient lighting. Muted contrast, relaxing cinematic aesthetic.
tracks.youtube_description: You survived. Now it is time to recover. 'The Aftermath' drops the tempo with atmospheric chill phonk, providing the perfect smooth backdrop for your heart rate to drop and your muscles to stretch. Drink some water, you earned it. 💧🧘‍♂️ #CooldownMusic #ChillPhonk #GymRecovery

tracks.title: Endorphin Release
tracks.youtube_title: Endorphin Release 🌌 Ambient Space Synths for Deep Recovery
tracks.listening_scenario: deep stretching, breathing exercises, leaving the gym
tracks.target_audience: all athletes focusing on mindful recovery
tracks.thumbnail_color_palette: midnight blue and soft starlight white
tracks.style_prompt: Ambient electronic chillout, 80 BPM, C Major. Lush, evolving ethereal synth pads with extremely long reverb tails. Very soft sub-bass, organic foley percussion (like vinyl crackle or water drops), distant electric piano. Hook in first 5 seconds via a beautiful, wide ambient chord fade-in. Pristine spatial audio mix. Instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, close-up of a calm athlete walking out of the gym doors into the cool night air. Zen-like peace and deep satisfaction. Midnight blue ambient light mixing with soft starlight white street lamps. Cinematic, serene, dark mode optimized.
tracks.youtube_description: Let the endorphins wash over you. The final track, 'Endorphin Release', offers 4 minutes of weightless ambient electronic bliss. Perfect for walking out of the gym, deep breathing exercises, and letting your mind completely relax. See you tomorrow. 🌌🎧 #DeepRecovery #AmbientWorkout #MindfulCooldown
